name: Natural Opening Out Movement
following_figure_names: Open Basic Movement (6-10), Closed Basic Movement (6-10), Underarm Turn To R, Fan (6-10), Reverse Top
notes:
The differences between Closed Hip Twist and Natural Opening Out Movement: (though this is different from the chart)
Closed Hip Twist
Amount of Turn: Lady does 1/2
Man step forward on step 1
Closed Hold
Chasse: Lady does pressed chasse (RF cross in front of LF)
Finish in PP
Natural Opening Out Movement
Amount of Turn: Lady does 1/4 (chart says 1/2)
Man step side on step 1(chart says fwd is ok)
"elbow hold" - both arms extended, Lady's LH near Man's R elbow.
Chasse: Lady does Compact Chasse (RF closed to LF) - (chart says RF fwd, slightly across LF) 
Finish in closed position

steps.action: Step to side or forward in Right Side Position, slight body turn to right, rotate frame to right
Compact Chasse LRL ending in Closed Position, slight body turn to left
Step back in Right Side Position, 1/2 turn to right
Chasse RLR forward and slightly across left foot, ending in Closed Position, 1/4 turn left then further 1/4
